name: io.github.chrischall/infinitecampus-mcp
description: Infinite Campus (Campus Parent) for Claude — grades, attendance, assignments, messages

environmentVariables.name: IC_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Campus Parent portal base URL, e.g. https://campus.district.k12.example.us

environmentVariables.name: IC_DISTRICT
environmentVariables.description: Infinite Campus district app name (appName path segment from the portal URL)

environmentVariables.name: IC_USERNAME
environmentVariables.description: Campus Parent portal username. Optional: leave unset to use the fetchproxy browser-extension fallback.

environmentVariables.name: IC_PASSWORD
environmentVariables.description: Campus Parent portal password. Required only when IC_USERNAME is set.

environmentVariables.name: IC_NAME
environmentVariables.description: Friendly name for the district (defaults to district appname)

environmentVariables.name: IC_DISABLE_FETCHPROXY
environmentVariables.description: Set to 1 to skip the fetchproxy browser-extension fallback (missing creds become a hard error — useful in headless CI).
